caption:
You listed 8×10. You delivered 8×9.6.

Manual resizing in Photoshop or Canva rounds decimal pixels. Your 8×10 might deliver at 8×9.6 — just enough to misalign in a standard mat or frame.

SnapToSize calculates every size to the exact pixel. 8×10 is always 2400×3000px. A4 is always 2480×3508px. 300 DPI, frame-guaranteed.

👉 snaptosize.com
